core.rationale: Test runner E2E Node-based stacks (react, vue, angular).

onDemand.rationale: Adapter .NET pour Blazor WASM. Install : dotnet add package + pwsh playwright.ps1 install.
onDemand.installCommand: dotnet add package Microsoft.Playwright && dotnet build && pwsh bin/Debug/net10.0/playwright.ps1 install

metadata.activation: Opt-in via Project Config `E2EMode: off | smoke | happy-paths | full`. STEP 8.bis qa-generate (v7.1 cabling).
metadata.notes: Tech Lead lance l'install (pas arch Phase A). Catalogue présent pour empêcher [STACK_LIBRARY_MISSING] quand E2EMode != off.
